name: Customer Support Agent
description: AI-powered customer support agent that helps users with product inquiries, technical issues, and ticket management. Can search knowledge base, create tickets, and provide troubleshooting assistance.

conversation_starters.title: Check ticket status
conversation_starters.text: What's the status of my support ticket #12345?

conversation_starters.title: Report an issue
conversation_starters.text: I'm having trouble logging into my account

conversation_starters.title: Product question
conversation_starters.text: How do I reset my password?

conversation_starters.title: Get help
conversation_starters.text: I need technical support for a software issue
